title: Smoky German Sausage with Sauerkraut Gratin
description: A hearty German-inspired dish featuring smoky sausage, tangy sauerkraut, and a crispy gratin topping.

ingredients.name: Smoky German Sausage
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality sausage with a nice balance of smoky and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: Sauerkraut
ingredients.notes: Look for a sauerkraut with a good balance of tangy and slightly sweet flavors.

ingredients.name: Gratin
ingredients.notes: A mixture of grated cheese, breadcrumbs, and spices to add a crispy topping.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the onion for a sweet and caramelized flavor.

ingredients.name: Caraway Seeds
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of nutty flavor with caraway seeds.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: Add a savory flavor with garlic powder.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for a flaky texture and a balanced flavor.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality butter for a rich and creamy flavor.

ingredients.name: Grated Cheese
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality cheese with a nice balance of flavors.

instructions: Slice the onion and cook in butter until caramelized.
Add the caraway seeds and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sauerkraut and cook until heated through.
Add the garlic powder and cook for an additional minute.
Slice the sausage and add to the skillet.
Cook the sausage until browned and cooked through.
Transfer the sausage and sauerkraut mixture to a baking dish.
Top with grated cheese and breadcrumbs.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
